mapper.sql: id , user_id, news_id, pid, content, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_comment (id, user_id, news_id, pid, content, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{newsId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_comment
id,
user_id,
news_id,
pid,
content,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{newsId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_comment
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
news_id = #{newsId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pid = #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_comment set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, news_id = #{newsId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pid = #{pid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
